tasks.title: Extract shared fleet recommendation logic
tasks.description: Create a single shared implementation for aircraft recommendation rows used by CLI and dashboard APIs.
tasks.details: Add fleet_recommend_rows(conn, hub_iata, budget, top_n) in a shared location. Return rows with aircraft, avg_daily_profit, max_daily_profit, cost, and days_to_breakeven. Wire existing CLI recommend() and api_fleet_plan to use it.
tasks.testStrategy: Confirm CLI recommend output and /api/fleet-plan output match for the same hub, budget, and top_n.

tasks.title: Add Buy Next page route and template
tasks.description: Create /buy-next page and template using Fleet Planner behavior.
tasks.details: Add page_buy_next in dashboard/routes/pages.py and create buy_next.html. Reuse Fleet Planner filters and HTMX behavior. Use the same valid origin hub sourcing from route_aircraft.
tasks.testStrategy: Load /buy-next and verify the table updates correctly when hub, budget, or top N changes.

tasks.title: Add Buy Next to navigation
tasks.description: Expose Buy Next in the dashboard navigation and any overview card area.
tasks.details: Update base.html to add Buy Next in a consistent location near Fleet Planner or My Routes. Add active styling if used elsewhere.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify nav link appears and active state is correct on /buy-next.

tasks.title: Document Buy Next behavior and MVP limits
tasks.description: Update README and page copy so behavior matches the shipped feature.
tasks.details: Document that Buy Next is hub-scoped, budget-constrained, based on extracted route_aircraft data, and uses average daily profit ranking. Mention that already-owned aircraft filtering is not in MVP unless Stretch A is added.
tasks.testStrategy: Review README and UI copy to confirm there are no claims beyond MVP.

tasks.title: Add already-owned aircraft context
tasks.description: Show owned quantity and optionally hide aircraft already owned.
tasks.details: Join my_fleet by aircraft shortname, show quantity owned, and add a hide-owned toggle.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify owned counts display correctly and toggle filters as expected.
